title: Kapitel 19 - HTML + CSS Check
description: Wissenscheck:  Stylesheets verlinken und wofür CSS verwendet wird.

questions.prompt: Which tag links an external CSS stylesheet?

explanations.overview: Use <link rel="stylesheet"> in the head to attach CSS.

byOptionId.link: Correct — <link rel="stylesheet"> in <head> loads external CSS.
byOptionId.style: Incorrect — <style> contains inline CSS, not an external link.
byOptionId.css: Incorrect — <css> is not a valid HTML tag.

options.label: Controls look and layout (colors, fonts, spacing)

explanations.overview: CSS handles presentation while HTML handles structure.

byOptionId.presentation: Correct — CSS controls presentation like colors, layout, and fonts.
byOptionId.data: Incorrect — CSS is not for storing user data.
byOptionId.server: Incorrect — CSS runs in the browser, not on the server.
byOptionId.html: Incorrect — CSS complements HTML but does not replace structure.
